creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #1)
Yes, of course. (how did you even get that far?). On 11.4 we have no qt5-network ("BROKEN" due to old openssl (unless you muck with non-default ssl)), which renders most qt5-based ports rather defunct.
Further, the code in question was the same in qmapshack 1.15.0, so it would be broken (if you got a working qt5-network with ssl support in the first place, which is - see above - not a given thing) in just the same way.
